title: Season 3 Warzone weeklies (Weeks 1-6)
sourceNote: Compiled from Dot Esports BO7/Warzone Season 3 weekly challenge guides (Weeks 1-6), Warzone sections only.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Black Ops Royale — complete activities
weeklyChallenges.description: Complete 15 activities in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Warzone — eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 40 eliminations. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Black Ops Royale — Grapple Hook distance
weeklyChallenges.description: Travel 200 meters with the Grapple Hook in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Black Ops Royale — Cradle Breach crates
weeklyChallenges.description: Open 5 crates inside a Cradle Breach in a single match in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Black Ops Royale — Exotic weapon kill
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 1 elimination with Exotic weapons in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W1: Warzone — Long Shot kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 3 Long Shot kills. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Warzone — Top 10 placements
weeklyChallenges.description: Earn 10 Top 10 placements. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Warzone — AR eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 40 eliminations with Assault Rifles. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Black Ops Royale — activate perks
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, activate 5 or more Perks in a single match 5 times. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Warzone — kills while Killstreak active
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 5 kills while your Killstreak is active. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Warzone — headshots in one match
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 2 headshots in a single match. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W2: Black Ops Royale — Wingsuit follow-up kills
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, kill enemies shortly after using your Wingsuit 3 times. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Warzone — ADS kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 40 kills while aiming down sights. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Warzone — sniper eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 10 eliminations with Sniper Rifles. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Black Ops Royale — Guild Robots
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, eliminate 10 Guild Robots. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Black Ops Royale — kills with perks active
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, get 3 kills while you have Perks activated. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Black Ops Royale — fast Target Uplink
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, complete a Target Uplink in less than 120 seconds. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W3: Black Ops Royale — eliminate a Mangler
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, eliminate a Mangler. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Black Ops Royale — zombies in Cradle Breaches
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, eliminate 50 Zombies in Cradle Breaches. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Black Ops Royale — weapon upgrades
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, upgrade weapons 20 times. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Warzone — pistol eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 10 eliminations with Pistols. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Warzone — tactical follow-up kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Kill an enemy that was recently affected by your Tactical 5 times. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Warzone — buy back or revive
weeklyChallenges.description: Buy back or revive 3 players. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W4: Black Ops Royale — armor + Trauma Kit
weeklyChallenges.description: In Black Ops Royale, have upgraded armor and a Trauma Kit active at the same time. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Warzone — first circle kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Kill enemies during the first circle 10 times. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Warzone — upgraded weapon eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 40 eliminations with upgraded weapons. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Warzone — loot caches without dying
weeklyChallenges.description: Open 15 Loot Caches without dying 5 times. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Warzone — zombie sniper headshots
weeklyChallenges.description: Headshot 15 Zombies with Sniper Rifles. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Warzone — enemy weapon eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 5 eliminations using enemy weapons. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W5: Black Ops Royale — Mangler in Cradle Gas
weeklyChallenges.description: Eliminate a Mangler inside the Cradle Gas. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Warzone — grapple follow-up kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 10 kills shortly after grappling. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Warzone — 3-kill streaks
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 3 kills without dying 5 times. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Warzone — LMG eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 15 eliminations with LMGs. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Warzone — lethal follow-up kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Kill an enemy that was recently damaged by your Lethal 5 times. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Warzone — kill with a Killstreak
weeklyChallenges.description: Get a kill using a Killstreak. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: W6: Black Ops Royale — Mystery Box in Cradle Gas
weeklyChallenges.description: Open a Mystery Box inside the Cradle Gas. Reward: 2,500 XP.
